heading: Tuesday Night
text: Scattered showers, mainly north; areas of freezing rain far north.
temperature: Low to mid 30s north, mid 30s to around 40 south

heading: Wednesday
text: Scattered showers; some freezing rain far north.

heading: Thursday
text: Rain/snow showers changing to snow showers.
temperature: Falling through the 30s north, into the 30s south
